mapper.insert: INSERT INTO dashboard_scan_progress (employee_id, file_path, last_offset, file_size, file_mtime, session_id, last_message_id, last_message_ts) VALUES (#{employeeId}, #{filePath}, #{lastOffset}, #{fileSize}, #{fileMtime}, #{sessionId}, #{lastMessageId}, #{lastMessageTs})

INSERT INTO dashboard_scan_progress (employee_id, file_path, last_offset, file_size, file_mtime, session_id, last_message_id, last_message_ts) VALUES (#{employeeId}, #{filePath}, #{lastOffset}, #{fileSize}, #{fileMtime}, #{sessionId}, #{lastMessageId}, #{lastMessageTs}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE last_offset = VALUES(last_offset), file_size = VALUES(file_size), file_mtime = VALUES(file_mtime), session_id = VALUES(session_id), last_message_id = VALUES(last_message_id), last_message_ts = VALUES(last_message_ts)
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM dashboard_scan_progress WHERE employee_id = #{employeeId} AND file_path = #{filePath}
